# Gregory Parizhsky

> Official portfolio of Gregory Parizhsky (also known as Greg Parizhsky, Parizhsky, Grisha Parizhsky) — NYC-based sculptor working in ceramic, wood, and mixed media. Student at Hamilton College studying Studio Art and Economics.

Gregory Parizhsky is a New York City based sculptor who uses a range of materials to create large-scale abstract works. Central concepts include philosophy, literature, and an exploration of religion and how different cultures interact with shrines.

- Name: Gregory Parizhsky
- Also known as: Greg Parizhsky, Parizhsky, Grisha Parizhsky
- Role: Sculptor
- Location: New York, NY, USA
- Education: Hamilton College (Studio Art, Economics)
- Contact: gregory.parizhsky@gmail.com
- Website: https://grisha.studio/

## Homepage

- [Homepage (Markdown mirror)](https://grisha.studio/index.md): full homepage content as Markdown
- [Homepage (HTML)](https://grisha.studio/): canonical homepage

## Galleries

- [Ceramic](https://grisha.studio/gallery/ceramic.html): ceramic sculptures and installations
- [Wood](https://grisha.studio/gallery/wood.html): wood-based sculptures and installations
- [Mixed Media](https://grisha.studio/gallery/mixed-media.html): mixed-media sculptural works
- [Work in Progress](https://grisha.studio/gallery/work-in-progress.html): active studies and unfinished works
